name: Rocky Roads
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9x5x3" loaf pan with waxed paper. Lightly butter the waxed paper.
2. Arrange marshmallows over the bottom of the prepared pan. Sprinkle the chopped walnuts around and on top of the marshmallows.
3. In the top of a double boiler, melt chocolate over hot, not boiling water, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat. Pour the melted chocolate over the marshmallows and walnuts, smoothing with a spatula. Let cool.
5. When firm, cut into rough squares using a sharp knife. Makes about 1 lb.
6. To store: Wrap each piece individually in waxed paper and plastic wrap. Will keep several weeks at room temperature.
